gh. 16 vgh, the two will agree - birth constellation and the
week-day. We are notjnstified in adding 18 Vighatis to the
birth time.
The late Mr. Rajagopala lyer in his New Era Directions in
Astrology has given a modified method which is claimed to
satisfy both the nakshatra and the week day. His formula is
simple.
Multiply the birth Vighatis by four and divide it by nine.
The remainder plus one is to be counted from Dhanishtha,
Mrigasira or Chitra, and it gives the nakshatra at birth. In
many cases we have found that one need not be added to the
remainder.
Multiply the birth Vighatis by three and divide it by
seven. The remainder to be counted from Friday. He has
taken Friday probably because Kaliyuga commenced on a
Friday.

Traditional Methods 15
Then 658 Vighatis according to the traditional version
gives Sravana nakshatra correctly; and according to Sri Raja
gopala Iyer's method gives the week day correctly as Thurs
day.
N.
